notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman grounds into a double play, third baseman Isaac Paredes to second baseman Jose Altuve to first baseman Christian Walker. Kyle Karros scores. Brenton Doyle to 3rd. Edouard Julien out at 2nd. Tyler Freeman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman grounds into a double play, third baseman Isaac Paredes to second baseman Jose Altuve to first baseman Christian Walker. Kyle Karros scores. Brenton Doyle to 3rd. Edouard Julien out at 2nd. Tyler Freeman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Yainer Diaz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Yainer Diaz grounds into a double play, second baseman Edouard Julien to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Taylor Trammell out at 2nd. Yainer Diaz out at 1st.
